judge.reason: The primary purpose is to build and send a WMI scan probe request OUI command, not to manage reference counts. The only refcount operation is the implicit allocation and freeing of an skb (a buffer), which is incidental to sending a command. The function contains significant non-refcount logic: constructing TLV headers, assigning fields, debugging, and sending the command.
